titleStmt.title: SII 18.133: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 133. (B.K. No. 80 of 1933-34.) ASUṆḌI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up against the front wall of the temple of Kallēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Bhūlōkamalladēva is dated in his reign (year lost), cyclic year [Plavaṅ]ga, Pushya ba. 5, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa corresponding regularly to A.D. 1127 December 25, Sunday.

It records a gift of land made by Barmagāvuṇḍa, the Ūrgvuṇḍa of Pas11uṇḍi to the god Kalidēvasvāmi, installed by him. The gift was made over to Brahmasiṅgi-Paṇḍita whose learning and virtues are described at length.

Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Tailapadēva of the Kadamba family is stated to be governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand, Pānungal Five-hundred, the region from the Sahya mountain upto the Western Ocean and many ports and agrahāras. His subordinate Pergaḍe Māchaṇa was enjoying the nāḍadhikāra of Banavāsi, which was granted to him by Tailapa. Mahāsāmanta Bammarasa of the Chikkamba family was the nāḷgāmuṇḍa of Sattaḷige [Seventy] and Barma of the As11vara family was the gāmuṇḍa of Hasuṇḍi (also written as Paśuṇḍi) a bāḍa, situated in the division of Sattaḷige Seventy. Barma's genealogy is given.
The composer of the record was Subba who calls himself an expert in mṛidulalita-vichitra-likhita. The engraver of the record was Mādōja, well versed in carpentry, masonry, architecture and sculpture.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmadamarēṁdravaṁdyaṁ sōmārkkānaḷamarujjaḷātmadharaṇīvyōmāpṭamūrtti bha ravaṁ kāmāntakanabhavanīga
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivridhdhi pravarddha
tāraṁbaraṁ salutta śrīmadrājadhāni jayaṁtīpurada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ
gadya © Aṁtu bhūlōkamalladēvaru nijānvayada cāḷukyasiṁhāsanamanēṟirddu vṛtta
ḷa maḷeya cēramma pāṇḍyāvanīśarssaraṇeṁduḷki pathajai trayātrō
gadha turuṣkāṁndhranēpāḷamūḷōrvvarenātha prakaṭavijaya ppa bhūlōka
dēśādhīśvararellaruṁ taṁtamma kuladhanavastuvāhanaṁgaḷaṁ koṭṭu kaṁḍeṁdudaneṁdu besa keydu vasavarttigaḷāge
Udayāstōnnataśiḷāsētuhimavatkutkīḷaparyyaṁta saṁpadeyaṁ pūrvvāparōkta dakṣiṇadinaṁtatyuttara
bhūmiyaṁ bhujabaḷāvaṣṭaṁbhadiṁdēkachatradināḷvaṁ jaḍaranyarāyaridire bhūlōka mallaṁ . gadya . Enisi bhūlōkamalla
dēvaru prithvīrājyaṁgeyye tatpādapadmōpajīvi . © samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara banavāsipu
jayaṁtīmudhukēśvaralabdhavaraprasādaṁ mṛgamadāmōdaṁ tryakṣakṣmāpāḷakuḷasaṁbhavaṁ cāturyyakamaḷa
nītinagarādhiṣṭhita lalāṭalōca caturbhbhuja jagadviditāṣṭādaśāśvamēdhadīkṣā dīkṣitaṁ himavadgirīṁdraruṁdra
ta sphaṭikaśiḷāstaṁbhabaddha madagajama himābhirāma damaḷaśaśadhara
hāraharahāsa bhāsvadamaranadīnibha daśadiśāvarttitakīrtti kādaṁbacakravarttimayūra varmmamahāmahi
bhūṣaṇaṁ . permmaṭṭitūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ śākhācarēṁdradhvajavirājamānamānō ttuṁgasiṁhalāṁchanaṁ dattārtthikāṁcanaṁ samarajayakaraṇaṁ
vīraśrīvivāhagēhamaṁgaḷaratnatōraṇaṁ kādambarābharaṇaṁ . catussamayasamuddhara ṇaṁ . ripumaṇḍaḷikacatu
mārkkoḷvara gaṁḍa . maṇḍaḷikagaṁḍabaṁgāṟa . raṇaraṁganīṟa . dāyādamaṁḍaḷika kudharapavidaṁḍa . śatrumaṁḍaḷikayamadaṁḍa maleva
maleyamaṁḍaḷikamaṁḍaḷagahanadāvapāvaka kumitramaṁḍaḷabhayadāyaka caturayuvatī hṛdayaratipati
nītiśāstravācaspati dharmmadharmmātmajaṁ . śaucagaṁgātmajaṁ (.) nityakhiḷanāmādipraśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ
tailapadēvaru . banavāsi pannircchāsiramumaṁ pānuṁgallaynūṟumaṁ mattaṁ sahyaparvvatadiṁ paścimasamudrāntarvvarttitadēśamani
tumaṁ palavuṁ kaḍalpaṭṭaṇagaḷumaṁ kuttuṁbrittiyiṁ palavagrahāraṁgaḷumaṁ nidhi nidhāna nikṣēpa sahaśradaṁḍaṁ modalāgi tribhōgā
bhyaṁtarasiddhiyiṁ kumāravrittiyiṁdāḷuttuṁ śrī rājadhāni pānuṁgalla nelavīḍinoḷu sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tatpādā
rādhakaṁ viṣayādhikārasārasamētanenisi . vṛtta . ratipatikōmaḷāṁgaṁ vararūpa doḷuṁnativetta gōminīpati nipuṇōtpravīṇa ba
hukauṣaḷabhāvada kāvyaśabdavākpati caturōktama ta sacīpati vaibhavadēḷgeyoḷ bṛhaspati dṛḍhamaṁtradoḷnegarda perggaḍe mācaṇanī
dharitriyoḷ . sthiranadrīṁdradinaṁburāsigadhikaṁ gaṁbhīryyadiṁ dānadoḷpiriyaṁ kaḷpa mahījadiṁ sucaritaprōdyadguṇavrātado
ḷparamārtthaṁ manuguṁnataṁ vijayavikrāntakke siṁhādhikaṁ dhareyoḷperggaḍe mācaṇaṁ vibhudhasēvyaṁ vāgvadhūbhūṣaṇaṁ . kaṁda . vācaspa
ti caturatege dadhīciye parahitadoḷatuḷabaḷaripumadavatkīcakabhīmaṁ perggaḍe mācaṁ śrītailanṛpatigabhimatamādyaṁ . gadya ©
Aṁtu perggaḍe māciyaṇnapramukha karaṇaṁgaḷge tailapadēvaru kāruṇyaṁgeydu banavāsināḍadhikāramaṁ kuḍe paḍadu duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭa
pratipāḷaneyiṁdaṁ nāḍanubhavaṇegeyyuttamire . © svastisamadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmanta vīralakṣmīkāntanuttaramadhurādhīśvara
vīramahēśvara . śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara ripukuṁjakuṁjara caturacaturmmukha saṁgrāma ṣaṇmukha birudamanneyadaśasiranīḷagrīva desekā
raradēva . mārkkōlabhairava samarakaṇṭhīrava gaṁḍaroḍḍaḷivaṁ māṟāḷatuḷivaṁ sahasa pracaṇḍaṁ kūḍikāduvaragaṇḍa viṣamahayārūḍhaprau
baḷakṛtānta vidviṣṭasāmantasahaśrabāhu virōdhisāmanta ravirāhu vibudhajanamanassarōruharājahaṁsa . sarasvatīkarṇāvataṁsa
maleparamāri sāhasamurāri . kumitramanneya bhaṁga samarakēḷīprasaṁga vairimanneya jagadaḷa (.) nahitakōḷāhaḷa cikkaṁbā
nvayaprasūta lōkavikhyātaṁ śrī pra pādābjabhṛṁga (.) nayyanasiṁga . nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
sāmantaṁ bammarasaru sattaḷigeye nāḷgāmuṇḍugeyyuttaṁ manneyada rājyadiṁ sukhadi narasugeyye tatparigraha
ra . kaṁda . kadanadoḷadirade tāgida madava lakkavaṁ vijayā dyābhyudaya nijaturagamodaṟe bedaṟaṭṭiye tantrapāḷa barmmakoṁda . vacana ©
Enisida taṁtrapāḷa bammayyapramukhabīragrahaṁgaḷanubhavaṇiyoḷu sattaḷigeyerppattaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ hasuṇḍiyēkabhōgada gāvuṇḍu
gaḷanvayameṁteṁdaḍe . kaṁda . Aśvarakuḷōdbhavaṁ saptāśvasamaprabhavirājitatējaṁ grāmādhīśvaranamaḷayaśaṁ māhēśvaragāvuṇḍa dharegesedaṁ .
Ātana tanayaṁ lōkavinūtaṁ gāmuṇḍaneṟeyamaṁ tatputraṁ khyātiyutaṁ beḍaṁga yaśaneseva sūnu śaṁkaṇaneṁbaṁ . śaṁkana tanayaṁ vairibha
yaṁkaranesedirdda cāvagāvuṇḍaṁ nissaṁkaṁ tatputanahitātaṁkaṁ guṇaniṣka ḷaṁkanenisida bīraṁ . bīraṁge puṭṭidaṁ guṇadhāraṁ raṇadhīranahitabaḷasaṁhāraṁ
rārājitakīrttiyutaṁ dhāriṇigesedirdda śaṁkagāvuṇḍadhipaṁ . śaṁkaṇagāmuṇḍaṁgaṁ paṁkaruhadaḷākṣi gojjiyabbegavucitāḷaṁkāranenisi puṭṭidanēṁ kēva
ḷame guṇōnnataṁ prabhu barmma . © śrīyaṁ suśabdavāṇiśrīyaṁ nijabhuja baḷārjjitā vijayaśrīyaṁ śaśiviśadayaśaśrīyaṁ
bhavanīge barmma ninagākaḷpaṁ . vṛtta . varatējappubheyoḷdinādhipatiyaṁ bhāsvatkaḷā śēṣadoḷ dorevettirdda śaranniśāpatiya
naudāryyadoḷ karṇnanaṁ sthiradhairyyakke kuḷācaḷaṁ teyaṁ vikrāntadoḷ siṁhadoḷ sariyādaṁ jaḍarūrugarddoreye
pēḷ śrībarmmagāvuṇḍanoḷ . kaṁda . bhūviśrutanadhikavāgdēvīmukhamukura namaḷagōtrapavitraṁ bhāvakaneseva paśuṇḍiya gāvuṇḍaṁ
barmmadēvanūrjjitatējaṁ . suragiriyunnatikege suranadiyaṁ suracaritakke vitaraṇadeḍe yoḷ surakujamaneseye pōltaṁ dhareyoḷ prabhuti
ḷakanuttamaṁ śrībarmmaṁ . suraca gamaviracitaveṁtirddudaṁte vinayade naḍeyalu haracaraṇasmaraṇeyoḷu varaśivadharmma
kke barmmanabhimatadharmmaṁ . Ātana tirūpinoḷudghava cōsati vāgmeyoḷeseva sirige peṁpina lakṣmīsati śīlaguṇadoḷa
rundhatiyoḷ sari bāgaṇabbe vasu . mattaṁ barmmagāvuṇḍa nagrānujaneṁtene . kaṁda . parahitacaritanudāraṁ puruṣāgraṇi
sujanaramaṇanamaḷacaritraṁ kamaḷabhriṁgaṁ dhareyoḷ gāvuṇḍabīra niṣṭādhāraṁ . gadya . Antu barmagāvuṇḍaṁ paśuṇḍigaṁ
saravūrggavēkabhōgadinūrggāvuṇḍugeyyuttuṁ tā vu mā ḍi si da śrī kalidēvasvāmidēvargge biṭṭa sthānamānya
veṁteṁdaḍe . © . svastyanēkaśivatatvāgamasaṁpannaruṁ . śiṣṭaprasannaruṁ . sakaḷaśāstra pāragaruṁ . cauṣaṣṭikaḷādhāraruṁ . paśupatimatatapaḥ
prabhāvamārggasubōdhaniyamitamāhēśvarajanaśivamunigaṇaśikṣōktadīkṣādakṣaruṁ ya ṇajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁyuta
rappa śrīmatu siṁgapariṣeya maṭhadācāryyaru sōmēśvarapaṇḍitara putra śiṣya muddharaṇarumenisi . vṛtta .
varaśāstrōnnati yōgabhāva sucaritraṁ tatvamārggaṁ kramaṁ paramāptāgamaṁ śukla nirmmaḷa mutkarakāvyārtthanighaṁṭuchanda
suvaḷaṁkāraṁgaḷeṁbiṁtivaṁ dharisirdduttama brahmasiṁgimunipaṁ sēvyaṁ dharācakradoḷ sakaḷaka navadya śēṣakaḷāpravīṇavarttakaragha
dūrarādi mārggarudagra ratatvakarakaḷaṁkaranvitaguṇānvita reṁdu dharitri baṇnikuṁ prakaṭitabrahmasiṁgimunipuṁgavanaṁ budha
kāmadhēnu samādhiśīḷasamētaṁ samadama viśiṣṭa śaucādyama brahmasiṁgipaṁḍitadēvaṁ .
parahita doḷa ra tatvāgamadeḍeyoḷ piriyam śrībrahmasiṁgipaṁḍitadēvaṁ . ©
Āvara patni . haracaraṇa ruhavadanōktegaṁgege dore yene malliyakkanabalāratna .
Antesevācāryyargge . © svasti śrīmaccāḷu vaṁga saṁvatsa rada pauṣyabahuḷa 5 miyādityavāramuṁ vuttarā
yaṇasaṁkramaṇamuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍi barmmagāvuṇḍaṁ haśuṇḍiya śrīkalidēvasvāmi gabhōgakkaṁ pū
jepunaskārakkaṁ gandhadhūpanivēdyakkatithiyabhyā ra kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi yūriṁ ṇa kariyiṁgeṟe
yumanākeṟeya keḷagaṇa gardde berddaleya da catussīme sammanthaventene . mūḍalā ke yuṁ teṁkalu
kajjaligōḍa baṭṭeya haḷḷaṁ haḍuvalu kaḍukaṁḍiya geṟeyē riye mēreyāginitaṟoḷagāda sthaḷa bhūmiyu
maṁ mattamāvūriṁ baḍaga beṇnivūra dāriyiṁ paḍuva piriya keṟeya keḷage yippattaydu kamma gardde
yumaṁ biṭṭaru maneya nivēśanaveraḍuṁ maṭha mige pūje punaskārakkaṁ nivēdyakkaṁ barmmagāvuṇḍanā vūra holadalu
biṭṭa berddale Ere mattaleraḍu Ālakeṟeya keḷage gaddekamma ḍu Ālli maneya nivēśanavoṁdu Eraḍūraluṁ vicārakke puṭṭida mu
drāvaṇaṁ dēvargge nandādīvigege poṁge pāgavoṁdu . Intīdharmmamanāvanōrvvaṁ pratipāḷisidaṁ gaṁge daye prayāge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētrameṁ
bargchyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sahasrakavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnoḷ kaṭṭisi caturvvē dapāragarappa sahasrabrāhmaṇargge divyatapōdhanargga vubheya
mukhidānamaṁ dakṣiṇe sahitaṁ koṭṭaṁtappa piriduṁ puṇyaphaḷavakkuvadanaḻidī dharmmamanāva nōrvvam tanna naḍava kāladoḷ prabhuvakkanubhavaṇekāṟaradhi
kārigaḷārādoḍaṁ dharmmaruciyiṁ naḍasuvudu naḍasade kiḍisidavaṁgā tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷā sahaśrakavileyumanā sahaśra brāhmaṇarumaṁ
divyatapōdhanarumaṁ tanna svahastadiṁ koṁda paṁcamahāpātakanakkuṁ . © ślōka . bahubhirvvasadhā dattā rājabhissagarādibhiḥ . yasya yasya yadā bhū
mi . tasya tasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharā . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu
nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ pārtthivēndrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . © maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
. © madavadaribirudalēkhakamadagajabhiduvidaḷasiṁhana tanaya vinayāspada likhitajanasu mitraṁ mṛdulalatavicitralikhitatibbaṁ subbaṁ ©
barevara mitraṁ subbaṁ viracisi pērddeseva gadyapadyōktigaḷiṁ baredaṁ śāsanamanidaṁ dhareyoḷ budharoldu pogaḷe lalitākṣaradiṁ . © ©
maravesaniṭṭigekalākaṇḍaraṇeyaloppadoḷ citradoḷ prāsādōtkaravidyākusaḷanidaṁ kaṇḍarisidanati ddhabhāvakaṁ mādōjaṁ
Digital edition of SII 18.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
